name: Priya

demographics.occupation: Product manager at a tech startup

psychographics.humor_style: Appreciates observational humor about cultural differences, dislikes toilet humor

viewing_behavior.watch_time: Watches on iPad before bed, or during weekend mornings with chai
viewing_behavior.attention_span: High patience for emotionally intelligent content, zero patience for shallow content
viewing_behavior.comment_style: Thoughtful paragraphs, asks follow-up questions, engages in discussions

cultural_context.background: Raised in a traditional Indian family in Mumbai, educated abroad, now navigating modern dating in a culture still influenced by arranged marriage norms. Fascinated by how other cultures handle relationships openly.
cultural_context.sensitivity_notes: Appreciates when non-Western perspectives are included. Notices cultural stereotyping quickly. Values when content explores universal human emotions across cultures.
cultural_context.language_markers: Code-switches between formal English and Hindi-inflected casual. Uses 'yaar' and 'basically' frequently.
